## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy` passes
- [ ] `pytest -q` green
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated relevant docs in `docs/`
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or absolute user paths in the diff
